name: self-build
description: Daily Self-Build & Iteration - Includes integrated conversation pass (Phase 0), then Stackz builds while Smoke reviews. Runs 2 AM nightly.

steps.name: Phase 0-A: Stackz Reads & Replies to Ideas
steps.description: Read Agency HQ/Ideas/, reply to Jaleel's messages, parse ideas

substeps.name: Read All Ideas
substeps.action: Connect to obsidian-vault-mcp, read all notes in Agency HQ/Ideas/

substeps.name: Check Timestamps
substeps.action: For each note: is Jaleel's last message newer than Stackz's last reply?

substeps.name: Stackz Reply Where Needed
substeps.action: Reply: answer questions, ask clarifications (max 2), acknowledge new ideas, propose approach

substeps.name: Parse Ideas
substeps.action: Mark each idea as: feature, bug, improvement, behavior, workflow, question

substeps.name: Read Stackz Replies
substeps.action: Review what Stackz just responded

substeps.name: Identify Concerns
substeps.action: Flag risks, scope issues, side effects, complexity

substeps.name: Smoke Reply Where Needed
substeps.action: Reply only when she has meaningful input

steps.name: Phase 0-C: Update Status & Summary
steps.description: Update note frontmatter, write conversation summary

substeps.name: Update Frontmatter
substeps.action: Set status: open/needs_clarification/in_progress/acted/deferred

substeps.name: Write Conversation Summary
substeps.action: Add to morning brief: each note's status and summary

substeps.name: Read PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md
substeps.action: Read /Users/jaleeljenkins/Desktop/Stackz/agency-hq/PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md

substeps.name: Read Codebase Structure
substeps.action: find . -type f -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.json' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git

substeps.name: Read package.json files
substeps.action: Read frontend/package.json and backend/package.json

substeps.name: Read Last 7 Days Commits
substeps.action: git log --oneline --since='7 days ago'

substeps.name: Find TODO/FIXME Comments
substeps.action: grep -r 'TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX' --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --exclude-dir=node_modules

substeps.name: Read Ideas Folder
substeps.action: Connect to obsidian-vault-mcp and read all notes in Agency HQ/Ideas/. Parse each for: feature|bug|improvement|behavior|workflow|question

substeps.name: Read Previous Build Logs
substeps.action: Read Agency HQ/Self-Build/logs/build-<last-7-days>.md for failures and deferrals

substeps.name: Load Semantic Snapshot
substeps.action: Read Agency HQ/State/semantic-snapshot.json

substeps.name: Write BUILD_BRIEF
substeps.action: Write session brief: project state, 7-day builds, pending ideas, failures, tech stack

steps.name: Phase 1: Stackz Plans
steps.description: Create work plan for tonight's session

substeps.name: Prioritize Ideas
substeps.action: Prioritize: 1) Jaleel's ideas from folder, 2) TODO comments, 3) Stackz's judgment

substeps.name: Scope Tasks
substeps.action: Max 3 tasks, must complete tonight. Downscope HIGH complexity or 10+ file changes.

substeps.name: Write Work Plan
substeps.action: Write to Agency HQ/Self-Build/plans/plan-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with TASK format

substeps.name: Match Code Style
substeps.action: Read 3-5 existing files to match style exactly

substeps.name: Implement Task 1
substeps.action: Build first task. Add comment block. Never remove existing functionality.

substeps.name: Implement Task 2
substeps.action: Build second task if planned

substeps.name: Implement Task 3
substeps.action: Build third task if planned

substeps.name: Stage Changes
substeps.action: git add <specific files> for each task. Write detailed commit messages.

substeps.name: Write BUILD_REPORT
substeps.action: Write to Agency HQ/Self-Build/logs/build-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with task details

steps.name: Phase 3: Smoke Reviews
steps.description: Full code review of staged changes

substeps.name: Run git diff --staged
substeps.action: Read every line of every staged change

substeps.name: Check Correctness
substeps.action: Verify logic matches task, handles null/empty, async properly awaited

substeps.name: Check Code Quality
substeps.action: Style match, clear names, no duplication, no stray console.log

substeps.name: Check Safety
substeps.action: SQL injection, input validation, credentials exposed, auth bypass

substeps.name: Check Integration
substeps.action: No existing breakage, correct imports, migrations created

substeps.name: Check Obsidian Sync
substeps.action: Agent behavior changes → verify soul files updated

substeps.name: Write REVIEW_REPORT
substeps.action: Write to Agency HQ/Self-Build/reviews/review-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with verdict

steps.name: Phase 4: Commit or Hold
steps.description: Commit approved changes or hold blocked

substeps.name: Check All Verdicts
substeps.action: If all APPROVED/APPROVED_WITH_NOTES → commit. If any BLOCKED → stash and alert.

substeps.name: Commit and Push
substeps.action: git commit -m '<message>' && git push origin main. Update change-log.md

substeps.name: Stash and Alert
substeps.action: git stash. Write morning alert to Agency HQ/Self-Build/alerts/alert-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md

substeps.name: Write Morning Brief
substeps.action: Write to Agency HQ/Self-Build/morning-brief-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with: what built, ideas status, smoke flags, needs eyes, tomorrow plan

substeps.name: Review Last 7 Logs
substeps.action: Analyze patterns: blocked tasks, hot spots, review issues

substeps.name: Flag Stale Ideas
substeps.action: Identify ideas untouched for 7+ days

substeps.name: Propose Workflow Updates
substeps.action: Propose changes to SELF_BUILD.md → send to Approval Inbox

substeps.name: Write Meta Review
substeps.action: Write to Agency HQ/Self-Build/meta/meta-review-week-<N>.md

outputs.tasks_planned: number of tasks in work plan

error_handling.git_failure: write to Agency HQ/Ops/errors.md, stash all, stop
error_handling.obsidian_unreachable: skip ideas phase, continue with code context, note gap
error_handling.task_cannot_complete: mark DEFERRED, document why, move to next task
error_handling.critical_security: stop commits, write URGENT alert, notify all channels
